estimand: Outcome AME for 10 percentage-point raw A-rate difference conditional on P4 controls.
interpretation: Primary confirmatory grade signal. Counts as the single primary evidence line for H_E and H_P.
limitation: Raw A includes both structural composition and residual grade signal.

estimand: Outcome AME for 10 percentage-point P3-S-FULL OOF residual difference.
interpretation: Conditional interpretation of RAW_A after P3 controls; not counted as an independent confirmatory replication.
limitation: When the same P3 controls enter P4, RAW_A and residual can span nearly the same added-information dimension.

estimand: Outcome AME for 10 percentage-point P3-S-NOPOLICY OOF residual difference.
limitation: Sensitivity only; not part of the primary hypothesis family.
